Cannibalize II  

Description

1: Decrease Hitpoints by 67.
2: Increase Mana by 21 (L38) to 53 (L130)

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 0 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 1.25 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Timer: 1 Target Type: Self
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: Your body aches as your mind clears.
Cast on other: Soandso winces.

Game Description

Channels your body's energy to refresh your mind, trading hit points for mana.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Cannibalize II
  • Spell: Cannibalize II

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Cannibalize II
Spell: Cannibalize II
ClassLevel
SHM38
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (17)
  • Scroll 1 Sold By (4)
  • Scroll 1 Quested (2)
  • Screenshots
Post Comment
Why is the spell data on this site so bad?
QuoteReply
# Jul 29 2019 at 5:51 PM Rating: Default
Dalarek
View User Forum
267 posts
67 hp for 30 mana. That's what it gives at every level.
▲ Page top
Why is the spell data on this site so bad?
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2019 at 7:23 PM Rating: Excellent
Gidono
View User Forum
Moderator
6,835 posts
Dalarek wrote:
67 hp for 30 mana. That's what it gives at every level.


It doesn't give 30 mana at every level. It starts out at giving 21 mana at level 38.

I just tested this on Xegony with a level 85 shaman and it gave back 42 mana per cast. There is no max value on the SPA data for slot 2 on this spell which means it gives back more mana the higher level the shaman is. It uses a multiplier of .25 starting out at a base1 value of 21 at level 38. The above slot 2 info is correct.

Here is how the calculation works out. Take the level times 0.25 and then add 21 onto that and that's how much it gives back for that level.

Here it is calculated all the way out to level 110.

Level Mana
38 21
39 30.75
40 31
41 31.25
42 31.5
43 31.75
44 32
45 32.25
46 32.5
47 32.75
48 33
49 33.25
50 33.5
51 33.75
52 34
53 34.25
54 34.5
55 34.75
56 35
57 35.25
58 35.5
59 35.75
60 36
61 36.25
62 36.5
63 36.75
64 37
65 37.25
66 37.5
67 37.75
68 38
69 38.25
70 38.5
71 38.75
72 39
73 39.25
74 39.5
75 39.75
76 40
77 40.25
78 40.5
79 40.75
80 41
81 41.25
82 41.5
83 41.75
84 42
85 42.25
86 42.5
87 42.75
88 43
89 43.25
90 43.5
91 43.75
92 44
93 44.25
94 44.5
95 44.75
96 45
97 45.25
98 45.5
99 45.75
100 46
101 46.25
102 46.5
103 46.75
104 47
105 47.25
106 47.5
107 47.75
108 48
109 48.25
110 48.5

abyssal sea
QuoteReply
# Mar 28 2004 at 2:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783321024
9 posts
The spell is indeed sold by the shaman spell vendor Hatem in the abyssal sea in the GoD expansion. They are sort of hard to find on the ship but it takes about 15-30 minutes of looking around to find it.

Xanatek lvl 39 shaman
Latvius lvl 65 overlord
Quellious

Abysmal Sea

# Mar 17 2004 at 12:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253900157
3 posts
Where is the Abysmal Sea? I cant seem to find it in any zone listing.
▲ Page top
RE: Abysmal Sea
QuoteReply
# Mar 29 2005 at 8:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362773308
32 posts
I got the spell today. Was 14p and change for my ogre shammy. The best way to find this zone is at LDON camps the Magus can teleport you to Nedaria's Landing. Then the Magus in Nedaria's Landing can teleport you to the Abysmal Sea. I couldn't use the Magus to get to Nedaria. (I suppose there is a level restriction.) So I went through Jaggedpine Forrest. Which you can hit through Blackburrow. (also surefall glade, I believe)
▲ Page top

# Mar 16 2004 at 9:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592261898949
3 posts
The quest for this spell was way too hard for the level. I had Canni III before i completed it. When i saw it for sale in the bazaar for 20pp I knew something was up. I bought a copy a resold it for 2k pp. I didn't know it was vendor sold. /shrug

QuoteReply
# Dec 16 2003 at 6:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253953963
31 posts
Ignore this post please (when i posted it this spell was not showing up under shaman spells ignore aa abilities on, however they removed the aa abilities listed as spells now so it is listed just like it should be now)

Edited, Sun Dec 28 07:19:40 2003
▲ Page top
Not so hard quest
QuoteReply
# Dec 04 2003 at 6:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592761182354
9 posts
I did this quest today in about 7 hours from start to finish.

First,I went out to TD to the location (neg8850, neg6040) and picked up the CRUSHED DIAMONDS off the ground.

Second, I went to the bazaar and paid 15pp for the STRANGE OCHRE CLAY.

Third, I got a group of guildies,5 of them all between 63-65 but this could be done with much lower characters. We went upstairs to the room where the Dravlorg Warlord was (room with a brain sitting on the table, just past the jail) and killed him. 15 minutes later the Skeletal Warlord popped in one of the jail cells, killed him and I got my GREYISH BONECHIPS.

Fourth, We ran out to TT, tracker saw a Froglok Yun Shaman on track, we ran right to him, killed em, and I got my SHAMAN POWDER.

The actual time that I worked on this quest was only about 4 hours. In the other hours we also stopped by EJ and SB to kill a couple epic scouts and we also played around in KC (got the extended range item and 2 helms of rile).

This quest is really not that hard at all. The hardest part is probably the mob in KC, and its more of a pain getting to him then it is killing him.

Good luck!

▲ Page top
question
QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2003 at 11:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591793862748
5 posts
what zone do u get this spell from??
▲ Page top
good with Stoicism
QuoteReply
# Aug 17 2003 at 7:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591793312141
5 posts
This spell is a pain to get if you are low 40's or 39, cuz of the high lvl zones the pieces you need are in, but I strongly suggest you get this spell because when you get Stoicism, You can abuse Stoicism and Canni2 for major mana advantage (because the mana you make using 650 HP with Canni is MORE than enough to pay for a Stoicism), even though one lvl after this combo is available you can get KEI again, but still, it will come in handy if KEI ever runs out so you won't have to leave group or camp spot to go grab another, sure Cann 1 CAN get the job done too, but Cann 2 makes it faster, which is more practical for higher lvls, thats just my 2 cents
▲ Page top
RE: good with Stoicism
QuoteReply
# Oct 17 2003 at 11:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591792890573
21 posts
wtf you can exp without kei.....
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 27 2003 at 10:44 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Amazing isn't it, seems unlike you, some people actually do know how to play the game without kei. As it has been post-kei. Frankly, I am happy to the lvl restrictions on kei now, teach people how to survive without it now. Only disadvantage is that it only takes longer to get fom when your soloing, hence longer periods between kills. Now hurtinudaily, I do apologize if your were sarcastic, if not then I don't.
